name_local: Státní hrad a zámek Český Krumlov

phrases.intent_en: Where is Baroque Theatre ticket office
phrases.text_local: Kde se prodávají lístky na Barokní divadlo?
phrases.cultural_note: The Baroque Theatre has a separate entrance and ticket counter, often tucked away from the main tour route.

likely_response.local: Samostatná pokladna je na druhém nádvoří vlevo.
likely_response.translation_en: The separate ticket office is in the second courtyard on the left.

responses.english: The separate ticket office is in the second courtyard on the left.
responses.french: Samostatná pokladna je na druhém nádvoří vlevo.

phrases.intent_en: When is next guided interior tour
phrases.text_local: Kdy začíná další prohlídka interiérů s průvodcem?
phrases.cultural_note: Castle tours run on a fixed schedule and fill up quickly; guides often announce the next available language slot.

likely_response.local: Anglická prohlídka začíná za dvacet minut.
likely_response.translation_en: The English tour starts in twenty minutes.

responses.english: The English tour starts in twenty minutes.
responses.french: Anglická prohlídka začíná za dvacet minut.

phrases.intent_en: Can I upgrade to full castle tour
phrases.text_local: Můžu si připlatit za rozšířený okruh celého zámku?
phrases.cultural_note: It is common to upgrade from a basic to an extended tour route at the ticket office before the tour starts.

likely_response.local: Ano, doplatek je sto korun na osobu.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the surcharge is one hundred crowns per person.

responses.english: Yes, the surcharge is one hundred crowns per person.
responses.french: Ano, doplatek je sto korun na osobu.

phrases.intent_en: How to reach Bear Moat from here
phrases.text_local: Jak se odsud dostanu k medvědímu příkopu?
phrases.cultural_note: The Bear Moat is a famous landmark between the first and second courtyards, accessible from the bridge.

likely_response.local: Projděte mostem, hned za ním je to vlevo.
likely_response.translation_en: Cross the bridge, it's immediately on the left after it.

responses.english: Cross the bridge, it's immediately on the left after it.
responses.french: Projděte mostem, hned za ním je to vlevo.

phrases.intent_en: Is Rosenberg Hall in this ticket
phrases.text_local: Je v téhle vstupence zahrnutý i Rožmberský sál?
phrases.cultural_note: Rosenberg Hall is a highlight of the main guided tour; ticket sellers confirm its inclusion to manage expectations.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it's part of the basic tour route.

responses.english: Yes, it's part of the basic tour route.
